label: Crime-State Overlap
title: Treasury targets overseas scam network tied to transnational crime structure
angle: Treasury said OFAC sanctioned nine individuals and 26 entities linked to Prince Group TCO, while FinCEN proposed expanding action around Huione/H-Pay. This fits the Matrix Reprogrammed crime-state overlap lane: cyber scams, laundering rails, front companies, and financial enforcement.
